name: Challenge: Create

description.en: Commit to something and stake tokens on it. If you prove it — you keep your stake. If you skip — the challenger takes it.
description.de: Verpflichte dich zu etwas und setze Token darauf. Wenn du es beweist, behältst du deinen Einsatz. Wenn nicht — bekommt ihn der Challenger.
description.fr: Engagez-vous sur un objectif et misez des tokens dessus. Si vous tenez parole, vous recupererez votre mise. Sinon, elle revient a l adversaire.
description.es: Comprometete con algo y pon tokens en juego. Si lo cumples, recuperas tu apuesta. Si fallas, se la queda quien acepte el reto.
description.ro: Asuma-ti un obiectiv si pune tokenuri la bataie. Daca reusesti, iti pastrezi miza. Daca nu, o castiga persoana care accepta provocarea.

bot: Creates an on-chain challenge with a stake. Ask the user what they want to commit to, which token to stake (EGLD or a stablecoin like USDC), how much to stake, and how long the challenge should run.

inputs.name: Stake

description.en: Token and amount to stake. If you fail, your challenger wins this.
description.de: Token und Betrag für den Einsatz. Wenn du scheiterst, geht er an den Challenger.
description.fr: Token et montant mises. En cas d echec, votre adversaire remporte cette mise.
description.es: Token y cantidad que vas a apostar. Si fallas, esa apuesta pasa a quien acepte el reto.
description.ro: Tokenul si suma puse ca miza. Daca esuezi, adversarul castiga aceasta miza.

inputs.bot: Token and amount to stake on the challenge. Can be EGLD or a stablecoin (e.g. USDC). Minimum 0.001 EGLD equivalent.

inputs.name: Title

description.en: What are you committing to? Be specific.
description.de: Wozu verpflichtest du dich? Sei konkret.
description.fr: A quoi vous engagez-vous ? Soyez precis.
description.es: A que te comprometes? Se especifico.
description.ro: La ce te angajezi? Fii concret.

inputs.bot: Short, specific commitment — e.g. 'Go to the gym tomorrow', '10k steps every day this week', 'No sugar for 3 days'.

inputs.name: Duration

description.en: How long does this challenge run?
description.fr: Combien de temps dure ce defi ?

inputs.bot: Duration in hours. Use 24 for a day challenge, 72 for 3 days, 168 for a week.

success.en: Challenge created! Share the link so someone can take the bet.
success.de: Challenge erstellt! Teile den Link, damit jemand die Wette annehmen kann.
success.fr: Defi cree ! Partagez le lien pour que quelqu un puisse relever le pari.
success.es: Reto creado. Comparte el enlace para que alguien pueda aceptarlo.
success.ro: Provocarea a fost creata! Distribuie linkul ca cineva sa poata accepta pariul.
